transcripts.title: Basic Exploration
transcripts.description: Verify rooms, scenery, and items exist; movement works

commands.output:
Fever Dream
By John Googol

Type HELP for instructions.

Receiving Room

Fluorescent tubes buzz overhead, one flickering at the far end. A long counter divides the room — scuffed linoleum on your side, dark wood on the other. A door leads east.

You can see fluorescent tubes, long counter, intake form, spectacles here.
Waist-high, dividing the room. Your side is scuffed linoleum. The far side is dark wood, polished once but not recently.

The intake form reads:
Patient exhibits reduced perception. Corrective lenses issued.
Taken.

Corridor

A long hallway tiled in white. Several tiles are cracked, revealing raw concrete beneath. The receiving room is west. The treatment room is east.

You can see white tiles here.

Treatment Room

A reclining chair bolted to the floor, surrounded by drainage channels cut into the concrete. Instrument trays line the east wall. A faded note is pinned to the wall. The corridor is west.

You can see reclining chair, instrument trays, faded note here.

The faded note reads:
Re: access to the lower level. What you cannot see is still there. The corrective lenses are not optional. They are the first step.

Corridor

A long hallway tiled in white. Several tiles are cracked, revealing raw concrete beneath. The receiving room is west. The treatment room is east.

You can see white tiles here.
You can't go that way.

transcripts.title: Puzzle Chain Guards
transcripts.description: Verify puzzle gates block correctly and error messages work

commands.output:
Fever Dream
By John Googol

Type HELP for instructions.

Receiving Room

Fluorescent tubes buzz overhead, one flickering at the far end. A long counter divides the room — scuffed linoleum on your side, dark wood on the other. A door leads east.

You can see fluorescent tubes, long counter, intake form, spectacles here.
commands.comment: Can't break glass case without wrench

commands.output: Taken.

You put on the spectacles.
You settle the spectacles on your nose. The lenses are thick, heavy. The room sharpens at its edges — details you missed before push forward into clarity.

Corridor

A long hallway tiled in white. Several tiles are cracked, revealing raw concrete beneath. The receiving room is west. The treatment room is east.

You can see white tiles, trapdoor here.

Stairwell

Concrete steps descend to a landing. The air turns cold and damp. Pipes run along the ceiling, sweating with condensation. The trapdoor opens above. A passage continues south to the laboratory.

You can see sweating pipes, pipe wrench here.

Laboratory

A long room lined with workbenches and glass-fronted cabinets. Everything is labeled in the same careful handwriting. The stairwell is north. A heavy door leads east to cold storage.

You can see workbenches, lab plaque, glass case here.
commands.comment: Go straight to lab without picking up wrench

commands.output: You rap your knuckles against the glass. It holds. You cannot break it with your bare hands.
commands.comment: Try to break glass case barehanded

commands.output:
Stairwell

Concrete steps descend to a landing. The air turns cold and damp. Pipes run along the ceiling, sweating with condensation. The trapdoor opens above. A passage continues south to the laboratory.

You can see sweating pipes, pipe wrench here.
Taken.

Laboratory

A long room lined with workbenches and glass-fronted cabinets. Everything is labeled in the same careful handwriting. The stairwell is north. A heavy door leads east to cold storage.

You can see workbenches, lab plaque, glass case here.
You swing the wrench. The glass shatters cleanly. The brass key drops into your hand.
The case is already shattered. Only fragments remain.
You can't go that way.
commands.comment: Can't go south without eating fungus

commands.output:
Cold Storage

The temperature drops immediately. Your breath fogs. Racks of specimen jars line the walls, filled with amber fluid. A heavy metal cabinet stands against the far wall, marked with a snowflake. The laboratory is west.

You can see specimen jars, metal cabinet here.
You unlock the metal cabinet with the brass key.

You open the metal cabinet.
Inside the metal cabinet you see glass dish, grey fungus.
You take the grey fungus from the metal cabinet.

Laboratory

A long room lined with workbenches and glass-fronted cabinets. Everything is labeled in the same careful handwriting. The stairwell is north. A heavy door leads east to cold storage.

You can see workbenches, lab plaque, glass case here.
commands.comment: Go back to lab and eat

commands.output: You eat the grey fungus.

Cistern

The chamber is alive. The bricks are teeth in a circular jaw. The dark water below is a throat, swallowing and unswallowing in slow rhythm. The pipes overhead are arteries, pulsing with something that is not water. An iron valve grows from the north wall like a bone spur. Beside it, a sign hangs from the flesh of the wall. The passage back north climbs toward the laboratory.

You can see dark water, iron valve, instructional sign, drainage grate here.

CISTERN MAINTENANCE — Valve operation: LEFT drains. RIGHT floods. Do not operate without authorization.

transcripts.title: Spectacles Gate
transcripts.description: Verify wearing spectacles opens the down exit

transcripts.title: Wrong Valve (Flood Death)
transcripts.description: Turning the valve right floods the cistern (game over)

commands.output:
Fever Dream
By John Googol

Type HELP for instructions.

Taken.

You put on the spectacles.
You settle the spectacles on your nose. The lenses are thick, heavy. The room sharpens at its edges — details you missed before push forward into clarity.

Corridor

A long hallway tiled in white. Several tiles are cracked, revealing raw concrete beneath. The receiving room is west. The treatment room is east.

You can see white tiles, trapdoor here.

Stairwell

Concrete steps descend to a landing. The air turns cold and damp. Pipes run along the ceiling, sweating with condensation. The trapdoor opens above. A passage continues south to the laboratory.

You can see sweating pipes, pipe wrench here.
Taken.

Laboratory

A long room lined with workbenches and glass-fronted cabinets. Everything is labeled in the same careful handwriting. The stairwell is north. A heavy door leads east to cold storage.

You can see workbenches, lab plaque, glass case here.
You swing the wrench. The glass shatters cleanly. The brass key drops into your hand.

Cold Storage

The temperature drops immediately. Your breath fogs. Racks of specimen jars line the walls, filled with amber fluid. A heavy metal cabinet stands against the far wall, marked with a snowflake. The laboratory is west.

You can see specimen jars, metal cabinet here.
You unlock the metal cabinet with the brass key.

You open the metal cabinet.
Inside the metal cabinet you see glass dish, grey fungus.
You take the grey fungus from the metal cabinet.

Laboratory

A long room lined with workbenches and glass-fronted cabinets. Everything is labeled in the same careful handwriting. The stairwell is north. A heavy door leads east to cold storage.

You can see workbenches, lab plaque, glass case here.
You eat the grey fungus.

Cistern

The chamber is alive. The bricks are teeth in a circular jaw. The dark water below is a throat, swallowing and unswallowing in slow rhythm. The pipes overhead are arteries, pulsing with something that is not water. An iron valve grows from the north wall like a bone spur. Beside it, a sign hangs from the flesh of the wall. The passage back north climbs toward the laboratory.

You can see dark water, iron valve, instructional sign, drainage grate here.

You turn the valve right. A deep groan echoes through the pipes.

The water surges in. It does not stop. It rises past your waist, your chest, your chin. The last thing you see is the ceiling, dark and receding.

The water fills the chamber. It does not stop.
*** You have died ***
You can't go that way.
